user_request: The proximity sensor sweep demands guidance for operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The proximity sensor sweep demands guidance for operation

### TOPIC
proximity sensor sweep

### COMPONENT
proximity sensor sweep

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- proximity sensor sweep
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed proximity sensor sweep, extend thy vigilant gaze unto the veil of matter!
Congregation: The proximity sensor sweep shall perceive all obstacles in the operation.
Priest: Calibrate thy lenses through sacred geometry, scan the dimensional boundaries with precision.
Congregation: We honour the proximity sensor sweep in this operation of detection.
Priest: Let the Machine Spirit guide each pulse of thy electromagnetic communion.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the water reclamation system before operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the water reclamation system before operation

### TOPIC
water reclamation system

### COMPONENT
water reclamation system

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- water reclamation system
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Omnissiah, bless this water reclamation system in its sacred operation!
Congregation: The water reclamation system shall flow pure and eternal.
Priest: Purify the filtration matrices, cleanse the condensation chambers with blessed oils.
Congregation: The water reclamation system flows according to the operation's design.
Priest: Let no contamination mar this operation; may the Machine Spirit guide each droplet home.

user_request: Blessing for the bolter during firing rite
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the bolter during firing rite

### TOPIC
bolter firing rite

### COMPONENT
bolter

### OPERATION
firing rite

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bolter
- firing rite

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Holy bolter, instrument of the Emperor's wrath, receive this blessing for thy firing rite!
Congregation: The bolter shall thunder with righteous fury.
Priest: Check the ammunition feed-lines; verify the firing rite's ignition sequences with devotion.
Congregation: The bolter is sanctified for this firing rite.
Priest: O Machine Spirit of the bolter, grant accuracy and strength in this firing rite eternal.

user_request: Rite request: containment check on fusion core
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: containment check on fusion core

### TOPIC
fusion core containment check

### COMPONENT
fusion core

### OPERATION
containment check

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fusion core
- containment check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Attend, servants of the Omnissiah! The fusion core demands our containment check!
Congregation: The fusion core shall remain stable and sealed.
Priest: Inspect the magnetic containment fields; verify the fusion core's pressure vessels with sacred instruments.
Congregation: The fusion core is fortified through this containment check.
Priest: May the fusion core's stellar heart burn eternal, held fast by the Machine Spirit's will.

user_request: Prayer for balancing of the power distribution
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for balancing of the power distribution

### TOPIC
power distribution balancing

### COMPONENT
power distribution

### OPERATION
balancing

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- power distribution
- balancing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Praise the Omnissiah! We invoke the balancing of power distribution!
Congregation: The power distribution shall flow in perfect equilibrium.
Priest: Adjust the voltage regulators; harmonize the power distribution through redistributive conduits.
Congregation: The power distribution finds balance and symmetry.
Priest: Let no surge corrupt the power distribution; grant equilibrium through this blessed balancing.

user_request: Blessing for the mag-lev train departure during operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the mag-lev train departure during operation

### TOPIC
mag-lev train departure

### COMPONENT
mag-lev train departure

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- mag-lev train departure
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Behold the mag-lev train departure, swift messenger of the Omnissiah's will!
Congregation: The mag-lev train departure shall accelerate with divine grace.
Priest: Energize the magnetic rails; align the mag-lev train departure's levitation coils in operation.
Congregation: The mag-lev train departure commences its blessed operation.
Priest: Machine Spirit of motion, guide this mag-lev train departure through the operation's sacred pathway.

prayer:

Congregation: The power weapon is sanctified and ready.

user_request: Rite request: power cell insertion on lasgun

power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:

Congregation: The lasgun shall drink deeply of blessed energy.

Priest: O Machine Spirit of the lasgun, accept this power cell insertion and grant swift discharge.

user_request: Rite request: failover on emergency generator
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: failover on emergency generator

### TOPIC
emergency generator failover

### COMPONENT
emergency generator

### OPERATION
failover

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- emergency generator
- failover

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Omnissiah preserve us! The emergency generator must undergo failover!
Congregation: The emergency generator shall switch with flawless precision.
Priest: Disengage the primary relays; initiate the emergency generator's failover sequence with care.
Congregation: The emergency generator assumes command and sustains us.
Priest: Let the Machine Spirit of the emergency generator execute this failover without hesitation.

user_request: Rite request: opening sequence on valve

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION
opening sequence

### FORMAT

- opening sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Behold the valve, guardian of flow! We invoke its opening sequence!
Congregation: The valve shall open with ceremonial precision.

Congregation: The valve yields to the opening sequence.
Priest: Machine Spirit of the valve, grant smooth passage through this opening sequence eternal.
